title: Overdraft 'Protection' Is a 17,000% Interest Rate
hook: You opted into overdraft protection to avoid embarrassment at checkout — and your bank is charging the equivalent of a 17,000% annual interest rate.
angle: Banks frame overdraft as a safety net when it's actually one of the most expensive short-term loans ever created — and they profit $15 billion a year from it while most customers don't even notice
audience: Anyone who has ever been hit with an overdraft fee, especially younger adults and lower-income households living paycheck to paycheck
key_numbers: 80% of fees paid by just 9% of customers
